title: NEBExpress MBP Fusion and Purification System
author: New England Biolabs
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bfayjifw

steps.title: Subclone the gene of interest into the pMAL-c6T vector
steps.instruction: Subclone the gene of interest into the pMAL-c6T vector.

steps.title: Grow cells containing the pMAL-c6T fusion...
steps.instruction: Grow cells containing the pMAL-c6T fusion plasmid in LB containing ampicillin and 0.2% glucose to an A 600 of ~0.5.

steps.title: Induce by adding IPTG to a final concentration of 0
steps.instruction: Induce by adding IPTG to a final concentration of 0.3 millimolar (mM) .

steps.title: Grow for an additional
steps.instruction: Grow for an additional: 02:00:00 at 37 °C OR 04:00:00 at 30 °C OR 06:00:00 – 08:00:00 at Room temperature OR Overnight at 12 °C to 16 °C .

steps.title: Harvest the cells and either freeze...
steps.instruction: Harvest the cells and either freeze immediately or resuspend in 25 ml column buffer (CB) per liter of culture.

steps.title: Lyse the cells by freeze-thaw followed by sonication
steps.instruction: Lyse the cells by freeze-thaw followed by sonication.

steps.title: Clarify the lysate by centrifugation at...
steps.instruction: Clarify the lysate by centrifugation at 20000 rpm, °C, 20 minutes .

steps.title: Dilute the supernatant (crude extract) by...
steps.instruction: Dilute the supernatant (crude extract) by adding 125 mL, cold CB for every 25 ml crude extract.

steps.title: Load the diluted crude extract on...
steps.instruction: Load the diluted crude extract on a 15 ml amylose column.

steps.title: Wash the column with ≥ 12 column volumes of CB
steps.instruction: Wash the column with ≥ 12 column volumes of CB.

steps.title: Elute the fusion protein with CB...
steps.instruction: Elute the fusion protein with CB containing 10 millimolar (mM), maltose .
